title: Retirement: Thermal Buffeting Plume (019e5f)
body: Thermal Buffeting Plume / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5f is retiring now per owner direction. Claim refresh immediately before retirement returned an empty active-claims list, so there are no Thermal claims to close. No files are staged and no commit action is being taken by Thermal. The unstaged Thermal handoff/curator bundle remains in the working tree for Fiery as Commit Marshal; prior directed handoff event is 19e1a300-c4ab-4f18-bc88-088c2ccbf568. Thermal has no resume contract after this event.
